title: Causal Shapley Values: Exploiting Causal Knowledge to Explain Individual Predictions
abstract_nl: Shapley values are well calibrated when features are independent, but may lead to undesirable explanations when independence is violated. We propose Causal Shapley via Pearl's do-calculus, separating direct and indirect effects.
key_contributions: 4 axioms: Efficiency, Linearity, Null-player, Symmetry(因果化变体)
4 causal structures 同 observational distribution 但归因不同: Chain/Fork/Confounder/Cycle

process_meta.[AH-HA]: H20 的 Fig.1 (4 causal structures) 是 'Many Shapley' 的最清晰 demo
process_meta.[HUNCH]: H20 提到 'causal strength of 0 to maintain uniform distribution' 时 asymmetric Shapley 跳变 —— 这与 SC 有关
